blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 7,478 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
